MELItem.Title: Ram Air Turbine (RAT) Position Indication System

ListItem.Para: RAT is verified to deploy normally.
RAT is verified to be stowed before each departure.

Note.Para: Dispatch is not allowed if status message RAT DEPLOY INOP is displayed prior to the next departure.

RAT DEPLOY INOP will be set during the first dispatch with a faulty RAT deploy position switch. If RAT deploy position switch is confirmed to be faulty (presence of the RAT deploy indication in the flight deck when the RAT is confirmed to be stowed), use dispatch tool K29005. This tool is only used to bypass the RAT deploy switch by connecting pins A and B on connector DM2921339P04. The status of the switch is used for indication purposes only and is not used in the logic to deploy the RAT during flight. The logic to deploy the RAT is unaffected while the dispatch tool is used. The RAT will physically deploy in the event of an emergency, however, the indication in the flight deck will continue to suggest that the RAT is still stowed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify that the RAT deploys (AMM DDG 29-21-02) and, prior to each flight, visually confirm that the RAT is stowed.

ListItem.Para: Push the RAM AIR TURBINE deploy switch on the P5 panel to extend the RAT.
Verify that the RAT assembly is in the fully extended position by checking that the turbine lock plunger is fully disengaged from the turbine hub.
Stow the RAT prior to flight.
Visually confirm that the RAT is stowed and the RAT door is closed prior to each flight.

OperationNote.Para: If dispatch tool K29005 is installed, RAT UNLOCKED advisory message will not be displayed.
